results.title: Carpinteria Reviews Possible Ballot Measure to Raise Sales Tax
results.description: The Carpinteria City Council on Tuesday reviewed a public outreach program for a proposed 0.25% sales tax increase and offered feedback on the draft ballot language. results.title: Jam tomorrow? Why Willis’ ‘sensible budget’ could sour the public mood
results.description: OPINION: Refusing to splash the cash in an election year is a bold move. But while the finance minister warns against putting the country’s fiscal future at risk, expecting voters to endure today’s pain without a short term salve could backfire come November.

results.title: Budget 2026: Changes to SuperGold card revealed
results.description: Changes to the SuperGold card, with $40 million dollars going into converting it into an ID card. They'll soon be printed with the holder’s photo, allowing seniors to use it to prove their identity. Seniors Minister Casey Costello says life can be difficult for those without a driver license or passport.
